prompt: A chase list: clients with outstanding documents ranked worst-first, and let me send one of them a reminder message without leaving the page.
wire:
export default function ChaseListPanel() { const [clients, setClients] = useState([]); const [selected, setSelected] = useState(null); const [message, setMessage] = useState(""); const [phase, setPhase] = useState("idle"); const [sentFor, setSentFor] = useState(null); useEffect(() => { tools.host_listClients({ filter: "missing" }).then((r) => { const sorted = (r.data || []).slice().sort((a, b) => { const aMissing = (a.documentsTotal ?? 0) - (a.documentsReceived ?? 0); const bMissing = (b.documentsTotal ?? 0) - (b.documentsReceived ?? 0); return bMissing - aMissing; }); setClients(sorted); }); }, []); const open = (client) => { setSelected(client); setMessage(""); setPhase("idle"); }; const send = async () => { if (!selected || !message.trim()) return; setPhase("sending"); const result = await tools.host_sendClientMessage({ id: selected.id, body: { body: message.trim(), author: "Firm" }, }); setPhase(result && result.status === "pending-approval" ? "awaiting" : "sent"); setSentFor(selected.id); }; const dismiss = () => { setSelected(null); setPhase("idle"); setMessage(""); }; const token = (name) => `var(--vendo-color-${name})`; const radius = (name) => `var(--vendo-radius-${name})`; return (
{clients.length === 0 && (
No clients with outstanding documents — nothing to chase this week.
)} {clients.map((c, i) => { const missing = (c.documentsTotal ?? 0) - (c.documentsReceived ?? 0); const ratio = c.documentsTotal > 0 ? (c.documentsReceived ?? 0) / c.documentsTotal : 0; const pct = Math.round(ratio * 100); const isSelected = selected && selected.id === c.id; const wasSent = sentFor === c.id && phase === "sent"; const isAwaiting = sentFor === c.id && phase === "awaiting"; const urgencyColor = missing >= 5 ? token("danger") : missing >= 2 ? "#b45309" : token("muted"); return (
isSelected ? dismiss() : open(c)}>

{c.documentsReceived ?? 0} of {c.documentsTotal ?? 0} collected
